title: Justin Boyd
compiled_truth: Justin Boyd is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-05 to 2001-11-28), Justin Boyd sent 125 and received 651 emails, totalling 776 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (62), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (37), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (14), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (10), [Amita Gosalia](people/amita-gosalia) (10). Mailbox folders observed: archive, deleted_items, inbox, isda, notes_inbox.
